patterns.reminder: nodeIntegration must stay false. Renderer code must never get Node access; use the typed IPC contract instead.
contextIsolation must stay true. Disabling it exposes the preload/main privilege boundary to the renderer.
sandbox must stay true for all BrowserWindows. If a capability is missing, add a typed IPC channel instead.
Never disable webSecurity or allow insecure content, including in dev builds.
Renderer must not call ipcRenderer directly. Use window.api.* backed by the Zod contract in packages/shared/src/ipc-contract.ts.
Tokens/secrets never go to web storage. Store via safeStorage through the auth IPC channel; keep only in renderer memory.
shell.openExternal must only receive URLs validated against the https allowlist helper — never backend/model-derived values directly.
webContents.executeJavaScript is code injection into the renderer. Prefer a typed IPC channel; if unavoidable, only static strings.
The <webview> tag is deprecated and unsafe. Use BrowserView/WebContentsView with strict options, or reconsider the design.
Do not weaken the CSP with unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval. Fix the underlying need (e.g. move inline scripts into modules).
